result.summary: Found 4 issues: one critical data mismatch, one major layout clipping issue, and two minor truncation issues.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays a badge reading '0 Games', yet multiple game cards are visibly rendered below it. This counter is clearly incorrect and contradicts the UI.
issues.suggestion: Fix the game count logic so the badge dynamically reflects the actual number of games displayed in the section.

issues.description: The rightmost game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are clipped/cut off at the edge of the screen, showing only partial game thumbnails and truncated titles (e.g., 'MAGNIFI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...').
issues.suggestion: Implement a proper horizontal scroll container with visible scroll indicators or arrows, or adjust the grid layout so cards are fully visible or clearly indicate scrollability.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab at the top is truncated and the label is not fully readable.
issues.suggestion: Allow the top navigation bar to horizontally scroll with a visible scroll hint, or abbreviate tab labels more gracefully so they remain legible.

issues.description: The 'Dark Water: The Curse...' game card title in the bottom row is cut off, making it hard to identify the full game name.
issues.suggestion: Ensure game card titles are either fully visible, use ellipsis with a tooltip, or the card is sized to accommodate the text.
